message:
feat(ensemble): add token estimation for ensemble runs

New estimation feature for predicting token usage before running ensembles:

- EstimateOptions: control estimation behavior with context pack overrides
- EnsembleEstimate: summarizes total tokens, budget, warnings
- ModeEstimate: per-mode breakdown (prompt, context, output tokens)
- Budget validation with over_budget and over_by fields

Uses build tag 'ensemble_experimental' for incremental rollout.

This helps users understand and optimize their token budget before
committing to expensive ensemble runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
